diet_rules: Drink 4-5 litres water daily
Eat light meals - avoid heavy proteins at lunch
Include curd or buttermilk every day
Best post-gym drink: coconut water + banana
Avoid: heavy non-veg, fried food, excess oil
Prefer: boiled eggs over omelette in heat
Morning workout better than evening in peak summer
Include cooling foods: cucumber, watermelon, mint, curd
Can eat heavier meals - body needs more energy
Add 1 tsp ghee to dal/roti for warmth
Include dry fruits: almonds, walnuts in morning
Best season for muscle building - appetite good
Evening workout fine - weather comfortable
Include: sarson ka saag, methi, gajar in meals
Warm protein sources preferred: chicken curry, dal tadka, egg curry
Avoid raw sprouts - bacterial growth risk
Prefer cooked and hot foods
Add turmeric and ginger to meals for immunity
Avoid street food - hygiene risk
Include: haldi doodh, ginger tea
Prefer boiled/steamed over raw vegetables
Good season for hot soups and dal
